svg.title: Cricket CMS Backend Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram showing API Gateway, 9 microservices, and infrastructure components including PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, and MinIO.

g.text: JWT auth · rate limiting · proxy · Redis
1. Client sends JWT → Gateway validates once → injects x-user-id + x-user-role headers
2. Downstream services trust headers (no re-verification) · Access: 15 min · Refresh: 7 days
3. Blacklisted tokens stored in Redis · Rate limiting enforced at gateway per IP
· Transactions table is append-only (immutable audit trail) · File uploads: multer memoryStorage → MinIO (synchronous)
· PDF reports: setImmediate() → 202 response immediately, generation async
· Notification Service consumes ALL 4 event queues: match · squad · financial · performance
